grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Comprehensively covers all key areas including governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security, AML, conflicts, and more

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Extensively details specific evidence needed including training records, complaints register, SRO appointment details, file review checklists, and many other specific documents

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions CQS Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement with specific evidence needed including appointment and role description

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: Covers protocol compliance monitoring through periodic CQS compliance reviews, action logs, internal audits, and conveyancing process alignment to Protocol stages

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: Dedicated section on information security covering cyber controls, staff training, secure transmission methods, and specific evidence requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: Comprehensive coverage of supervision policy, file review processes, case management systems, and file retention requirements with specific evidence types
